task.title: Make wiki-resume honor persisted task focus across sessions
task.summary: Fix /wiki-resume without an explicit task so fresh Pi sessions use persisted CodeWiki focus/resume state instead of falling back to the first active roadmap task.

goal.outcome: A new Pi session can run /wiki-resume and pick the intended persisted focus task, matching codewiki_state guidance.
acceptance: /wiki-resume with no explicit task prefers a valid persisted focus/resume task when present.
Generated status/resume views agree with roadmap queue and persisted focus instead of reporting a different next task.
Smoke coverage proves a later persisted focus on TASK-033 wins over earlier active TASK-029 ordering.
Explicit /wiki-resume TASK-### continues to override persisted focus.
non_goals: Do not redesign full session compaction or multi-agent scheduling.
Do not close unrelated verification tasks.
verification: Run codewiki_state refresh=true and confirm green health.

delta.desired: Fresh sessions resume the same focused roadmap task from persisted CodeWiki state.
delta.current: New sessions lose Pi branch-local focus, so /wiki-resume can choose the first active roadmap task such as TASK-029 while codewiki_state suggests TASK-033.
delta.closure: Resume selection and generated views are aligned, covered, and verified.
